evidence: All 45 detectors and all observer models use comparison.
We cannot describe observation without comparison, but this is a limitation of description, not proof about observation.
We experience observation as sequential, but cannot prove non-sequential observation is impossible.
Identity may be required for reporting but not for observing.
The argument uses comparison (which requires difference) to prove difference is needed.
Distinction may be necessary for the observer boundary but not for observation itself.
